title: Canonical address point feature (student-facing basemap layer)
description: E911-style address points normalized for Skarion Vetro. Editor identities and free-text notes from the source are intentionally not representable.

address_external_id.description: Publisher GlobalID (braces stripped). ADDRESS_ID is unpopulated in the county export, so the GlobalID GUID is the stable join key.

full_address.description: Label name as published (house number + full road name).

street_full.description: Publisher's assembled road name (RD_FULLNAM), preserved verbatim.

road_segment_external_id.description: County road SEGMENT_ID — future join to a road centerline layer.

address_type.description: Publisher classification, e.g. SINGLE FAMILY, OPEN SPACE, UTILITIES.

status.description: E911 lifecycle status. OPEN = active assigned address.

parcel_external_id.description: Linked parcel (WCAD PARCELID) via point-in-polygon at intake; null if the point falls outside the fixture parcels.
